data.narrative:
Saronic is a Series D-stage frontier defense and security company founded by Dino Mavrookas, Rob Lehman, Vibhav Altekar, and Doug Lambert, currently valued at $9.25B on $2.6B+ in total raised. The peer universe comprises 10 comparables—2 public (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private—anchored by Helsing, Chaos Industries, Onebrief, Anduril Industries, and Shield AI.

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.5x step-up multiplier to the $9.2B last post-money valuation, yielding $13.9B. Peer-median analysis draws on three same-sector, same-stage comparables with a median valuation of $4.5B (range: $2.1B to $18.0B), directly implying $4.5B.

The triangulated range spans $3.8B (low) to $16.0B (high), with a median of $9.2B. This median aligns closely with Saronic's stated $9.25B post-money valuation. Key uncertainties include the wide dispersion in peer valuations—a 8.4x spread from $2.1B to $18.0B—and the limited sample size of three same-stage comparables. The stage-progression method's 1.5x multiplier assumption and the representativeness of the peer set remain material variables in narrowing the valuation range.
